name: B2B ops dashboard — Shopify refund forecaster

persona.name: Marcus
persona.background: ops lead at a 30-person DTC apparel brand; comfortable with spreadsheets, not with code
persona.decision_style: decisive on scope, asks Maya for the technical defaults

product.concept: An internal web dashboard that connects to our Shopify + Stripe, predicts the dollar value of refunds we'll process next week, and flags the top-5 SKUs driving them.
product.target_user: Our ops team (3 people) — they live in this dashboard every Monday morning. Not customers.
product.known: Internal-only, 3 users, no auth complexity (we use Google SSO for everything). Shopify + Stripe data, ~50k orders/year. Want it on a $0-50/mo budget.
product.unknown: Don't know where to host, what DB to use, how to do the forecasting. I trust your recommendation.

objectives: Get the data pipeline shape right (Shopify → DB → dashboard).
Push Maya to call out whether a hosted forecasting service or a Python script is better.
Make sure the sprint has tasks for both the data ingest AND the UI.
